sizing_rule.note: Set stop loss width at 2.0R multiple. This is a calibration rule: tighter stops (lower R multiple) reduce win rate; wider stops (higher R multiple) preserve capital on winners but increase per-trade loss. Requires minimum 20 trades per cycle and 35% minimum win rate for profitability given the 2.0R stop choice.

source_rule_text: A trader should balance stop loss tightness against system reliability, recognizing that tighter stops reduce win rate and require more trades to achieve profitability, while wider stops preserve capital on winning trades but increase single-trade loss magnitude.
